items.headline: 3 Utility Stocks For Years of Passive Income
items.summary: Passive income arrives whether you work, sleep, or travel. Dividend income depends on a company writing a check four times a year. For investors covering utility bills, property taxes, or groceries, the math must be concrete and the underlying businesses must be boring in the best possible way. Utilities sell essential services under regulated rate ... 3 Utility Stocks For Years of Passive Income

items.headline: This Investment Pro Is Leaning Into Risk. Why He Likes Defense, Ag Tech, and Infrastructure.
items.summary: Alex Chaloff, the chief investment officer and head of investment and wealth strategies at Bernstein Private Wealth Management, says he likes to push his clients to take more risk than they might prefer.  Geopolitical and economic uncertainties have many investors on edge, and price/earnings ratios for U.S. market leaders are at historic highs.  “If we get earnings growth rates for the S&P in the mid- to high teens or low 20s this year, the rest will take care of itself,” Chaloff says.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Bloom Energy (BE) Lands $5 Billion AI Power Deal And Wyoming Offtake Project
items.summary: Bloom Energy (NYSE:BE) has entered a US$5b global AI infrastructure partnership with Brookfield focused on powering data centers. The company has agreed to a US$2.65b, 20-year offtake project with American Electric Power for a fuel cell facility in Wyoming. These agreements frame Bloom Energy as an onsite power supplier for large AI factories with multi-gigawatt, long-duration contracts. Bloom Energy sits at the intersection of distributed power generation and the rapid buildout of AI data...
